title: Ampacus elaeodendroides
taxonomy: Ampacus elaeodendroides is a genus of flowering plants in the family Salicaceae. Further classification for Ampacus elaeodendroides places it within the order Malpighiales. The family Salicaceae is also known as the willow family. This classification suggests that Ampacus elaeodendroides shares characteristics with willow plants and other related species in the Malpighiales order. Overall, the classification of Ampacus elaeodendroides reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
